scripts.start: concurrently -n api,dashboard -c blue,magenta "pnpm --filter @brain/api dev" "wait-on http-get://localhost:${API_PORT:-3000}/network -t 30000 && pnpm --filter @brain/dashboard dev"
scripts.setup:gaze: cd nodes/gaze/server && python3.11 -m venv .venv && .venv/bin/pip install -U pip && .venv/bin/pip install -r requirements.txt && .venv/bin/python -m app.setup_models && cd ../web && npm install
scripts.dev:gaze: concurrently -n gaze-api,gaze-web -c yellow,magenta "pnpm run dev:gaze:server" "wait-on http-get://localhost:8766/api/health -t 60000 && pnpm run dev:gaze:web"
scripts.setup:voice: cd nodes/voice/server && python3.11 -m venv .venv && .venv/bin/pip install -U pip && .venv/bin/pip install -r requirements.txt && .venv/bin/python -m app.setup_models && cd ../web && npm install
scripts.dev:voice: concurrently -n voice-api,voice-web -c cyan,green "pnpm run dev:voice:server" "wait-on http-get://localhost:8765/api/health -t 30000 && pnpm run dev:voice:web"
